Extra code to generate a complea heatmap instead of using ampvis

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| label: fig-b12-phyla-complex-heatmap
#| fig-cap: Relative abundance of bacterial phyla at baseline among those with B12 deficiency (<200 pg/mL), insufficiency (200-300 pg/mL), and sufficiency (>300 pg/mL).
df <- heatmap$data %>% 
  dplyr::select(phyla = Display, Sample , relAbund = Abundance) %>% 
  mutate(timepoint = bac_b12_meta$timepoint[match(Sample,bac_b12_meta$sample_names)]) %>%
  mutate(b12_status = bac_b12_meta$b12_status[match(Sample,bac_b12_meta$sample_names)])

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(Sample, timepoint, b12_status), values_from = relAbund) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rows <- df_long[,1]
mat <- df_long[,2:ncol(df_long)]
rownames(mat) <- rows
mat <- data.matrix(mat)

b12_status_label <- unlist(lapply(colnames(mat),function(x){
  if(grepl("_insufficiency",x)) "Insufficiency (200-300 pg/mL)"
  else if(grepl("_sufficiency",x)) "Sufficiency (>300 pg/mL)"
  else if(grepl("_deficiency",x)) "Deficiency (<200 pg/mL)"

}))

b12_status_colour <- assign_unique_colors(b12_status_label)

timepointDf <- unlist(lapply(colnames(mat),function(x){
  if(grepl("Baseline",x)) "Baseline"
  else if(grepl("Endpoint",x)) "Endpoint"
}))

timepoint_colour <- unlist(lapply(colnames(mat),function(x){
  if(grepl("Baseline",x)) "#66C2A5"
  else if(grepl("Endpoint",x)) "#E78AC3"
}))

library(ComplexHeatmap)

col_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(`Vitamin B12 Status` = b12_status_label, col = list(`Vitamin B12 Status` = b12_status_colour), which = "column")

get_group_means <- function(mat, b12_status_label) {
  # Convert to data frame for easier manipulation
  df <- as.data.frame(mat)
  df$row_names <- rownames(mat)
  
  # Add group information
  df_long <- tidyr::pivot_longer(df, 
                                -row_names, 
                                names_to = "column", 
                                values_to = "value")
  df_long$b12_status <- b12_status_label[match(df_long$column, colnames(mat))]
  
  # Calculate means per group and taxa
  group_means <- df_long %>%
    group_by(row_names, b12_status) %>%
    summarise(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')
  
  return(group_means)
}

# Calculate group means
group_means <- get_group_means(mat, b12_status_label)

Heatmap(mat,
        cluster_columns=T,
        width = unit(0.5, "npc"),
        cluster_rows = F,
        column_gap= unit(5, "mm"),
        col = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0,0.3,0.6),ggheatmap_palette),
        column_dend_height = unit(30, "mm"),
        row_names_side = "left",
        row_names_gp=gpar(cex=1, fontface = "bold"),
        show_column_names = F,
        show_heatmap_legend = T,
        top_annotation = col_annotation,
        heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Relative Abundance"))

```
